testcase.name: TC-AUTH | Authentication API › TC-AUTH-001 | Login with valid credentials returns token
TC-AUTH | Authentication API › TC-AUTH-002 | Login with invalid password returns error
TC-AUTH | Authentication API › TC-AUTH-003 | Login with empty username returns error
TC-AUTH | Authentication API › TC-AUTH-004 | Login with empty password returns error
TC-AUTH | Authentication API › TC-AUTH-005 | Token is a valid string
TC-CART | Carts API › TC-CART-001 | Get all carts returns 200 and array
TC-CART | Carts API › TC-CART-002 | Get single cart returns correct schema
TC-CART | Carts API › TC-CART-003 | Cart products have productId and quantity
TC-CART | Carts API › TC-CART-004 | Create a cart returns new cart with id
TC-CART | Carts API › TC-CART-005 | Update a cart returns updated data
TC-CART | Carts API › TC-CART-006 | Delete a cart returns deleted cart
TC-PROD | Products API › TC-PROD-001 | Get all products returns 200 and array
TC-PROD | Products API › TC-PROD-002 | Get single product returns correct data
TC-PROD | Products API › TC-PROD-003 | Product schema has all required fields
TC-PROD | Products API › TC-PROD-004 | Price is a number not a string
TC-PROD | Products API › TC-PROD-005 | Get products by category returns correct items
TC-PROD | Products API › TC-PROD-006 | Get all categories returns array of strings
TC-PROD | Products API › TC-PROD-007 | Limit query returns correct number of products
TC-PROD | Products API › TC-PROD-008 | Response time is under 3 seconds
TC-PROD | Products API › TC-PROD-009 | Create a product returns new product with id
TC-PROD | Products API › TC-PROD-010 | Update a product returns updated data
TC-PROD | Products API › TC-PROD-011 | Delete a product returns deleted product
TC-USER | Users API › TC-USER-001 | Get all users returns 200 and array
TC-USER | Users API › TC-USER-002 | Get single user returns correct data
TC-USER | Users API › TC-USER-003 | User schema has all required fields
TC-USER | Users API › TC-USER-004 | User name has firstname and lastname
TC-USER | Users API › TC-USER-005 | User address has correct structure
TC-USER | Users API › TC-USER-006 | User email is a valid format
TC-USER | Users API › TC-USER-007 | Get invalid user returns empty or error
has title
get started link
TC-AUTH | Login UI › TC-UI-001 | Valid login redirects to products page
TC-AUTH | Login UI › TC-UI-002 | Welcome message shows correct username
TC-AUTH | Login UI › TC-UI-003 | Login page has correct fields
TC-AUTH | Login UI › TC-UI-004 | Password field masks input
TC-AUTH | Login UI › TC-UI-005 | Invalid credentials shows error message
TC-AUTH | Login UI › TC-UI-006 | Empty username shows error
TC-AUTH | Login UI › TC-UI-007 | Empty password shows error
TC-AUTH | Login UI › TC-UI-008 | Logout returns to login page
TC-PROD | Products UI with Fixtures › TC-FIX-001 | Products load after login
TC-PROD | Products UI with Fixtures › TC-FIX-002 | Cart starts at zero
TC-PROD | Products UI with Fixtures › TC-FIX-003 | Can filter by electronics category
TC-PROD | Products UI with Fixtures › TC-FIX-004 | Adding items updates cart correctly
TC-PROD | Products UI › TC-UI-009 | Products grid is visible after login
TC-PROD | Products UI › TC-UI-010 | Products page shows multiple products
TC-PROD | Products UI › TC-UI-011 | Category filter is visible
TC-PROD | Products UI › TC-UI-012 | Filter by electronics shows correct products
TC-PROD | Products UI › TC-UI-013 | Filter by jewelery shows correct products
TC-PROD | Products UI › TC-UI-014 | Cart count starts at zero
TC-PROD | Products UI › TC-UI-015 | Adding product increases cart count
TC-PROD | Products UI › TC-UI-016 | Adding multiple products updates cart count
TC-PROD | Products UI › TC-UI-017 | Logout from products page works
